title: USDA invites agriculture producers to respond online to the 2023 Irrigation and Water Management Survey
summary: Today, the USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) mailed survey codes to a selected sample of irrigators across the 50 states with an invitation to respond online to the 2023 Irrigation and Water Management Survey.

title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: November 16, 2023
summary: November 16 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , and at a steady rate of 6.01% (up a bit from last week’s rate of 5.64%), from the level on 11/09/2023 of 9.298 M km 2 to 9.893 M km 2 for this week.
